Package neqsim.process.diagnostics.restart

Class RestartSequenceGenerator.RestartPlan

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.restart.RestartSequenceGenerator.RestartPlan
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
RestartSequenceGenerator
public static class RestartSequenceGenerator.RestartPlan extends Object implements Serializable
A complete restart plan with ordered steps and metadata.

    • RestartPlan

      public RestartPlan(String initiatingEquipment)
      Creates a restart plan.
      Parameters:
      initiatingEquipment - the equipment that caused the shutdown
